summary: Iteration 37 - ALL TESTS PASSED. Testing late payments red badge, Caroline Maerten challenge fix, GHL sale accounting transaction, and replace coach per-week dialog. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working.

late_payments_red_badge.badge_color: PASS - Uses var(--color-danger) RED color (distinct from onboarding BLUE badge)

caroline_maerten_challenge_fix.data_verification: PASS - Caroline Maerten has 0 trainings and 0 check-ins in all weeks
caroline_maerten_challenge_fix.week_indicators: PASS - All weeks (1-6) show grey numbers, no green checkmarks

challenge_stats_s1.s1_expected: PASS - Should show 5 (not 6) since Caroline has 0 check-ins

replace_coach_per_week_dialog.week_selectors: PASS - Shows S1-S5 with dropdown for each week
replace_coach_per_week_dialog.coach_dropdown: PASS - Shows 'Antoine Paucod (50 CHF/h)' and other coaches
replace_coach_per_week_dialog.api_update: PASS - PUT /api/courses/{id} with week{n}_instructor field works
replace_coach_per_week_dialog.visual_indicator: PASS - Yellow border on attendance cell when week has override coach

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create/delete TEST_ prefixed data automatically. Challenge has 6 original participants + TEST_Sale_User from tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 37 features verified: 1) Late payments RED badge shows count 2 in sidebar on Paiements nav. 2) Caroline Maerten correctly shows 0% completion with all weeks grey (no check-ins). 3) Challenge S1 stats show 5/71% (not 6/100%) since Caroline excluded. 4) GHL confirm-sale creates accounting transaction with 'VENTES / ABONNEMENTS' category. 5) Replace coach dialog shows S1-S5 dropdowns, updates week{n}_instructor via PUT, yellow border indicates override. Current data: 2 late payments, 7 challenge participants (6 original + 1 test), 4 courses in March 2026.
